text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit and a cup of coffee. Then, I leave for work by 8:15. My job at a small office keeps me busy until 5 PM, with a short lunch break around noon. After work, I try to exercise for about 30 minutes. I alternate between jogging in the park and doing yoga at home. In the evening, I cook dinner, watch a show or read, and finally go to bed by 10:30. This routine helps me feel organised and healthy throughout the week.
